allow: Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader\('IDC.pdf'\); print\(f'Pages: {len\(reader.pages\)}'\); [print\(f'--- Page {i+1} ---'\); print\(reader.pages[i].extract_text\(\)\) for i in range\(min\(10, len\(reader.pages\)\)\)]")

Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('IDC.pdf'\); print\(f'Pages: {len\(pdf.pages\)}'\); [print\(f'--- Page {i+1} ---\\n', pdf.pages[i].extract_text\(\)\) for i in range\(min\(10, len\(pdf.pages\)\)\)]")

Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader\('IDC.pdf'\); print\(f'Pages: {len\(reader.pages\)}'\); [print\(f'--- Page {i+1} ---'\); print\(reader.pages[i].extract_text\(\)\) for i in range\(min\(15, len\(reader.pages\)\)\)]")
